course_title: MODELING AND SIMULATION IN POLYMER PROCESSING
description: This course is designed to acquaint the student with computer simulation technology used for the engineering of polymer processes. Knowledge of polymer processing [such asM E 417] strongly encouraged.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing or declared in Capstone Certificate in Polymer Processing and Manufacturing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing or declared in Capstone Certificate in Polymer Processing and Manufacturing
